blocked_actions.do_not_do: Use the generated long-span bundle gate as the source of truth; do not run broad long-span sweeps while it reports 0 of 8 gates met.
blocked_actions.stop_rule: Do not run broad long-span bundle sweeps until search frontier, raw-suffix break-even, selected-span, and control gates pass.

blocked_actions.do_not_do: Do not add transform metadata to `.tlmr` yet.
blocked_actions.stop_rule: Reject format work if exact hits remain absent after held-out validation.

blocked_actions.do_not_do: Do not implement production GPU acceleration until CPU evidence identifies a worthwhile target workload.
blocked_actions.stop_rule: Stop GPU work if it cannot beat CPU streaming on the promoted workload under parity tests.

blocked_actions.do_not_do: Keep replication corpora in a separate frontier artifact unless the team intentionally accepts the expensive matrix-regeneration cascade.
blocked_actions.stop_rule: Keep the separate artifact as the source of truth while raw prefix>=5, exact-hit, and selected-span rows remain zero.

blocked_actions.do_not_do: Keep broad depth-3 structured sweeps gated after the bounded compression follow-up returned null.
blocked_actions.stop_rule: Abort deeper search if frontier exact discovery remains prefix-only with no exact hits.

reopen_triggers.promotion_gate: Open this lane only when LONG_SPAN_BUNDLE_GATE reports every prerequisite gate met or an intentional override is documented with new evidence.
reopen_triggers.suggested_artifact: Use `docs/LONG_SPAN_BUNDLE_GATE.md`; only replace this with a sweep artifact after the generated gate passes.

reopen_triggers.promotion_gate: Promote into canonical matrices only for accepted coverage expansion or after unrelated ordinary groups produce prefix>=5 movement, exact hits, or selected spans while controls stay null.
reopen_triggers.suggested_artifact: Use `docs/HELDOUT_CORPUS_EXPANSION.md`; schedule matrix integration only with an explicit regeneration budget.

reopen_triggers.promotion_gate: Promote broader depth-3 or opt-in depth-4 work only if a new lead finds prefix>=6 movement, exact hits, selected spans, negative delta, or forecast scale below 1 GiB for one expected exact hit.
reopen_triggers.suggested_artifact: Use `docs/SEARCH_FRONTIER_GATE.md` as the broad go/no-go gate before any raw depth or full depth-4 proposal.

reopen_triggers.promotion_gate: Only draft a format extension after a reversible transform produces repeatable exact seed-span wins.
A CPU workload shows repeatable exact hits but is too slow, then GPU parity and benchmark work becomes valuable.
reopen_triggers.suggested_artifact: Keep `docs/ACCELERATION.md` as the GPU promotion gate.

unmet_long_span_gates.consequence: Do not run long-span raw-depth sweeps while the frontier gate is closed.
Long-span search is not compute-rational from the current forecast.
Do not optimize long-span bundle packing before profitable spans exist.
Prefix-4 movement remains steering evidence, not long-span bundle evidence.

unmet_long_span_gates.observed: 3 ordinary groups, 1 control groups, control density comparable True
unmet_long_span_gates.consequence: Current exact short-hit density is too control-like to justify broad long-span work.
Residual-vector evidence does not yet support long-span bundle promotion.

unmet_long_span_gates.observed: seed-table ordinary groups 0; schema replication controls 2; claim control_failed_on_frozen_expansion_corpora
unmet_long_span_gates.consequence: Public dictionary signals stay research-only until replication controls pass.
Descriptor packing remains narrow and does not justify broad long-span bundle sweeps.

allowed_maintenance: regenerate checked evidence artifacts when an upstream source changes
run verification gates and fix stale hashes or stale wording
tighten documentation around non-claims, stop rules, and compatibility boundaries
pre-register new corpus or preset manifests without claiming compression
use subagents for independent read-only audits or disjoint low-risk patches
